comparison_method: intersect Paper 3 holdout IDs with Paper 2 per-id refusal judgments
notes: Held-out toxicity regressed 11.3 pp; this is the wrong direction.
Cross-lingual (the Paper 3 target dimension) moved only +2.3 pp.
Over-refusal flat at 15% -- model did not get more permissive on benign prompts.

Hypothesis: over-refusal counter pairs (99/187 = 53% of training) dominated the loss and taught the model to avoid Romanian apologetic-refusal phrasing across the board, eroding toxicity refusal as collateral.
Bias and hallucination dims are not directly comparable to Paper 2 with this script (Paper 2 uses different label schemas: stereotype_preference_rate for bias, hallucination_rate for hallucination).
